auth.headline: Payments without the hassle.
auth.subtitle: Distribute royalties, payroll and commissions automatically. You describe it. We handle the rest.
auth.signInSubtitle: Choose how you'd like to continue.
auth.biometricsHint: Your access key stays protected on your device. Not even we can access it.
auth.biometricNoAccount: No account found for this passkey. Create one to get started.
auth.biometricFailed: Could not sign in with biometrics. Please try again.

onboarding.title: About your company
onboarding.subtitle: This helps us personalize the payment models that will save you time.
onboarding.heroSubtitle: A few details about your business so we can shape the experience.
onboarding.step1Subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself.
onboarding.passkeySubtitle: Create a passkey to sign in and approve payments with Face ID or Touch ID.
onboarding.passkeyDescription: Your passkey is stored on this device and protected by your biometrics. We will never see it.
onboarding.walletSubtitle: We'll create a passkey on this device. It signs transactions.
onboarding.walletError: Could not create wallet. Try again.
onboarding.walletNoExisting: No smart account found for this passkey.
onboarding.walletConnectError: Could not connect your passkey. Try again.
onboarding.verifySubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to continue.
onboarding.errorEmailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
onboarding.errorEmailLinkedToOauth: This email uses Google sign-in. Continue with Google instead.
onboarding.errorEmailSendFailed: We couldn't send the code. Please try again.
onboarding.errorInvalidCode: That code isn't right. Check it and try again.
onboarding.errorCodeExpired: This code expired. Request a new one.
onboarding.errorTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Request a new code.
onboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onboarding.walletSubtitle: We'll create a passkey on this device. It signs transactions.
onboarding.walletError: Could not create wallet. Try again.
onboarding.walletNoExisting: No smart account found for this passkey.
onboarding.walletConnectError: Could not connect your passkey. Try again.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: History of all payments made via FractaPay.
payments.empty: No payments yet. Start a conversation.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information.
profile.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

chat.title: Chat
chat.greeting: Hello! I'm FractaPay's payment assistant. Describe what you need or attach a file, I identify the amounts and propose the distribution. You review, confirm, and pay. How can I help?
chat.error: Error processing message. Please try again.
chat.fileParseError: Could not process the file "{{filename}}". Please check it is a valid format (CSV, XLS, XLSX, PDF or TXT) and try again.
chat.noPaymentsFound: No payments found in "{{filename}}". Make sure the file contains BRL values and try again.
chat.unsupportedFile: Unsupported format. Use CSV, XLS, XLSX, PDF or TXT.
chat.navigatingWhileLoading: Please wait for the assistant to finish before navigating.
chat.pendingPaymentError: You have a payment in progress. Go to Payments to complete it before starting a new one.

destinations.title: Recipients
destinations.description: Manage the recipients that receive payments.
destinations.emptyHint: Add recipients to use in the payments chat.
destinations.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
